Experience the Art of Woodcraft

Join Hanil Woodcraft Atelier and delve into exclusive workshops, bespoke designs, and a community of woodworking enthusiasts.

Become a Member

Our Story

Hanil Woodcraft Atelier embodies a legacy deeply rooted in the rich traditions of Korean woodworking. For over three generations, our family has been dedicated to the craft of creating exquisite, handcrafted furniture. Founded in the heart of Seoul, our atelier began as a small workshop, fueled by a passion for preserving the timeless beauty of wood and transforming it into functional art.

From humble beginnings, sourcing local Korean pine and oak, we have grown into a respected institution, known for our unwavering commitment to quality, sustainability, and design innovation. Our philosophy is simple: to honor the natural integrity of the wood, employing time-honored techniques passed down through generations, while embracing contemporary aesthetics to create pieces that are both timeless and relevant to modern living.

Each piece of furniture crafted at Hanil Woodcraft Atelier tells a story – a story of meticulous craftsmanship, of the skilled hands that shape and mold the wood, and of our deep respect for nature's artistry. We believe in creating furniture that is not just visually stunning but also deeply meaningful, designed to be cherished and passed down through families, carrying with it the legacy of Korean woodcraft.

Our atelier is more than just a workshop; it is a sanctuary where creativity flourishes, where the scent of natural wood fills the air, and where artisans pour their hearts into every creation. We are driven by a desire to share our passion for woodworking with the world, offering bespoke furniture design, restoration services, and immersive workshops that allow enthusiasts to experience the magic of woodcraft firsthand. We invite you to join us on this journey, to discover the enduring beauty and artistry of Hanil Woodcraft Atelier.

As we look to the future, we remain committed to our founding principles, continually seeking new ways to innovate and inspire, while staying true to the traditions that define us. We are proud to be a part of Korea's vibrant craft heritage and dedicated to ensuring that the art of woodcraft continues to thrive for generations to come. Our commitment to excellence and meticulous attention to detail ensures that every piece leaving our atelier is a testament to our unwavering dedication to the craft.

Our Expertise

Custom Furniture Design

Embark on a collaborative journey with our master artisans to design bespoke furniture that perfectly reflects your unique style and complements your living or workspace. From initial concept sketches to the final handcrafted masterpiece, we meticulously bring your vision to life, ensuring every detail is tailored to your desires. We utilize a variety of premium woods, sourced sustainably, and employ both traditional Korean techniques and modern design principles to create furniture that is not only beautiful but also deeply personal.

Furniture Restoration

Preserve the legacy of your cherished furniture pieces with our expert restoration services. Our skilled craftsmen possess a deep understanding of historical and contemporary furniture making, allowing us to meticulously revive both antique heirlooms and modern classics. We employ time-honored techniques, using traditional tools and materials, to restore the original beauty and structural integrity of your furniture, ensuring it can be enjoyed for generations to come. From minor repairs to complete overhauls, we handle each piece with the utmost care and respect.

Antique Furniture Repair

Entrust your valuable antiques to our specialized repair service, where preservation and authenticity are paramount. We understand the delicate nature of antique furniture and employ conservation-grade techniques to address structural issues, surface damage, and age-related wear. Our specialists are adept at working with a wide range of antique furniture styles and materials, ensuring repairs are not only seamless but also historically accurate, maintaining the intrinsic value and character of your treasured pieces. We treat every antique with the reverence it deserves, ensuring its longevity and beauty for future generations.

Bespoke Cabinetry

Elevate your home or office with our bespoke cabinetry solutions, meticulously designed and handcrafted to enhance both functionality and aesthetic appeal. We collaborate closely with you to create custom cabinets that seamlessly integrate into your space, reflecting your personal style and meeting your specific storage needs. From elegant kitchen cabinetry to sophisticated built-in wardrobes and unique display units, our bespoke creations are crafted from the finest hardwoods and finished to perfection, adding a touch of refined elegance to any environment. Experience the luxury of custom-designed cabinetry that is as practical as it is beautiful.

Wood Finishing

Protect and enhance the natural beauty of your wood furniture and surfaces with our professional wood finishing services. We offer a comprehensive range of finishes, from traditional hand-rubbed oils and waxes to durable lacquers and environmentally friendly water-based options. Our expert finishers meticulously prepare each surface, ensuring a flawless application that highlights the wood's unique grain and character. Whether you desire a classic, warm patina or a contemporary, sleek look, we tailor our finishing techniques to achieve your desired aesthetic, providing lasting protection and enhancing the inherent beauty of the wood.

Join the Atelier Community

Unlock exclusive benefits and deepen your appreciation for the timeless art of woodcraft by becoming a member of Hanil Woodcraft Atelier. Our membership program is designed for woodworking enthusiasts of all levels, from beginners eager to learn the basics to seasoned artisans looking to refine their skills and connect with a community of like-minded individuals. As a member, you'll gain access to a wealth of resources and opportunities to immerse yourself in the world of fine woodworking.

  • Exclusive access to woodworking workshops and masterclasses: Learn from our master artisans and guest experts in intimate, hands-on sessions covering a wide range of techniques and styles.
  • Priority booking for custom design consultations: Receive preferential scheduling and personalized attention when commissioning bespoke furniture pieces.
  • Special discounts on furniture restoration services: Preserve your cherished furniture at reduced rates, ensuring their beauty and longevity.
  • Invitations to member-only events and atelier tours: Be the first to experience new collections, attend exclusive gatherings, and explore behind-the-scenes at our workshop.
  • Access to our online community forum for woodworking enthusiasts: Connect, share, and learn with fellow members, exchanging ideas and inspiration in a supportive online space.

Sign Up for Membership

Thank you for signing up! Welcome to the Hanil Woodcraft Atelier community.

What Our Clients Say

"The restoration work on my antique chest of drawers was truly exceptional. Hanil Woodcraft Atelier revived its original beauty and exceeded my expectations in every way. The attention to detail and craftsmanship is remarkable. I highly recommend their services to anyone looking to restore precious furniture pieces."

- Park Seo-joon

"I am absolutely thrilled with the custom dining table Hanil Woodcraft designed and created for me. It's a stunning centerpiece that perfectly complements my home's aesthetic. The quality of the wood and the finish are outstanding, and the design process was seamless and enjoyable. It's more than just furniture; it's a work of art."

- Kim Min-ji

"Participating in the woodworking workshop at Hanil Woodcraft was an incredibly insightful and hands-on experience. I learned so much in just a few hours and am now deeply inspired to explore the art of woodcraft further. The instructors were knowledgeable and patient, and the atmosphere in the atelier was truly inspiring. I highly recommend their workshops to anyone interested in woodworking, regardless of skill level."

- Lee Jae-hyun

Meet Our Artisans

Choi Sung-ho

Master Woodcrafter

With over 30 years dedicated to the craft, Master Choi Sung-ho is the heart and soul of Hanil Woodcraft Atelier. His unparalleled expertise in traditional Korean woodworking techniques, combined with an innate understanding of contemporary design, guides our atelier's vision. He is not only a master craftsman but also a passionate mentor, nurturing the talents of our team and ensuring the legacy of Korean woodcraft continues to flourish. His hands have shaped thousands of exquisite pieces, each bearing the mark of his dedication and mastery.

Lee Eun-ji

Design Director

Lee Eun-ji, our Design Director, infuses Hanil Woodcraft with a fresh, modern aesthetic. Having studied design both in Seoul and abroad, Eun-ji expertly blends innovative design concepts with sustainable practices. She is the creative force behind our custom projects, working closely with clients to translate their visions into stunning, functional furniture. Beyond design, Eun-ji also leads our popular design workshops, inspiring a new generation of woodcraft enthusiasts with her passion and expertise.

Park Hyun-woo

Restoration Specialist

Park Hyun-woo is our dedicated Restoration Specialist, driven by a profound respect for the heritage of antique furniture. With meticulous skill and patience, Hyun-woo undertakes the delicate process of restoring treasured pieces to their former glory. His deep knowledge of historical furniture construction and finishing techniques ensures that every restoration project is approached with the utmost care and authenticity. He is passionate about preserving the stories embodied in antique furniture, ensuring they continue to be appreciated for generations to come.

Visit Us or Get in Touch

We invite you to visit our atelier in the heart of Seoul to experience the artistry of Hanil Woodcraft firsthand. Our doors are open Monday to Friday, and we welcome you to explore our workshop, view our current collections, and discuss your custom furniture needs with our team. If you are unable to visit in person, please do not hesitate to reach out to us via phone or email. We are always happy to answer your questions and assist you with your woodworking inquiries.

Address

17 Sejong-daero, 7th Floor
Seoul, 04522 South Korea

Phone

+82-2-735-8900

Email

info@hanilwoodcraft.com

Business Hours

Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM

About Hanil Woodcraft Atelier

Hanil Woodcraft Atelier is dedicated to preserving the art of Korean woodcraft, offering bespoke furniture design, restoration services, and immersive workshops. Rooted in tradition and inspired by contemporary design.
